event: New Mexico United defeated Lexington SC 4–1 at home in USL Championship regular season play.
Lexington SC conceded four goals in a 4–1 road loss at New Mexico United.
Miami FC defeated Indy Eleven 2–0, continuing a positive run against that opponent.
Indy Eleven suffered a 2–0 home loss to Miami FC, conceding four goals across two recent matches without reply.
Sporting Jax defeated Pittsburgh Riverhounds 2–1 at home, collecting three points against a conference contender.
Pittsburgh Riverhounds defeated Louisville City FC 3–1 but earlier lost 2–1 at Sporting Jax — a split double-header result on July 22.
Louisville City FC lost 3–1 at Pittsburgh Riverhounds, dropping to fourth in the Eastern Conference.
Detroit City FC defeated Indy Eleven 2–0, keeping pace with Charleston Battery in second place on goal difference.
Tampa Bay Rowdies drew 1–1 with Loudoun United at home, dropping two points while holding Eastern Conference top spot on 32 points.
Loudoun United earned a 1–1 draw at Eastern Conference leaders Tampa Bay, collecting a point from a difficult road trip.
Brooklyn FC drew 2–2 at Sporting Jax in USL Championship regular season play.
Charleston Battery drew 1–1 at Sacramento Republic FC, dropping points and allowing Detroit City FC to level them in second place on goal difference.
Rhode Island FC defeated Hartford Athletic 1–0, steady form continuing ahead of the playoff stretch.
Hartford Athletic lost 1–0 to Rhode Island FC, failing to take three points in a direct competitor matchup.
FC Tulsa defeated El Paso Locomotive FC 1–0 at home, maintaining defensive solidity in a tight contest.
El Paso Locomotive FC lost 1–0 at FC Tulsa, extending a disciplinary and on-field inconsistency trend in 2026.
Las Vegas Lights FC defeated San Antonio FC 2–1, grinding out three points despite the league's lowest rate of touches in the opposition penalty area.
Phoenix Rising FC defeated Monterey Bay FC 3–2 in a five-goal contest, staying in contention in a tight Western Conference table.
Monterey Bay FC lost 3–2 at Phoenix Rising FC in a five-goal match, a narrow defeat in the competitive Western Conference.
Peoria City defeated Minneapolis City SC 4–0 in the USL League Two Central Conference Semifinal, advancing to the Conference Final.
Minneapolis City SC were eliminated from the 2026 USL League Two Playoffs by Peoria City, losing 4–0 in the Central Conference Semifinal.
Ballard FC are scheduled to face Ventura County Fusion in a USL League Two Conference Final at Atwood Stadium, Flint, MI (3:00 PM ET).
Ventura County Fusion are scheduled to face Ballard FC in a USL League Two Conference Final at Atwood Stadium, Flint, MI (3:00 PM ET).
Vermont Green FC are scheduled to face Asheville City SC in a USL League Two Conference Final at PEG Energy Stadium, Laredo, TX (6:30 PM ET).
Asheville City SC are scheduled to face Vermont Green FC in a USL League Two Conference Final at PEG Energy Stadium, Laredo, TX (6:30 PM ET).
Flint City Bucks host Peoria City in a USL League Two Conference Final at Atwood Stadium, Flint, MI (7:30 PM ET).
Laredo Heat SC host Fort Lauderdale United FC in a USL League Two Conference Final at PEG Energy Stadium (9:30 PM ET).
Fort Lauderdale United FC face Laredo Heat SC away in a USL League Two Conference Final at PEG Energy Stadium (9:30 PM ET).
Corpus Christi FC remain winless across all 10 USL League One matches played since the March 7 season opener — the league's longest active winless run in 2026.
Fort Wayne FC hold a 7-game unbeaten run in USL League One 2026, the longest active streak in the league.
Charlotte Independence carry a 4-game winning streak in USL League One, one of the two longest active winning runs in the league.
USL announced USL Premier (Division One) targeting 20 clubs, launching in 2028, with promotion and relegation between all three USL professional tiers to be introduced.
